issues.title: Enemy dealt 54 dmg (100% of 54 HP) on floor 6 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 6, encounter 2, turn 19 (seq 420), the enemy dealt 54 damage which is 100% of the player's 54 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 5-5): HP stayed above 90
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with HP > 90. Encounters: F5E0:95HP, F5E1:93HP, F5E2:91HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or reduce healing on early floors.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 75% accuracy: attrition death
issues.description: The player was defeated on floor 6 with an overall accuracy of 75%. High-accuracy players should have a fair chance of survival; this suggests the damage/healing balance is too punishing.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage scaling or increase healing from correct answers.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 0: 7 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7 (2.6x)
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 3 (enemy: crystal_golem, common) took 7 turns to resolve, which is 2.6x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 9 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7 (3.4x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 (enemy: magma_core, boss) took 9 turns to resolve, which is 3.4x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: Floor 6 enc 2: 19 turns vs prev floor avg 5.0 (3.8x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 (enemy: knowledge_golem, boss) took 19 turns to resolve, which is 3.8x the previous floor's average of 5.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: HP dropped from 100 to 0 in floor 6 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 6, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 0. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage caps per encounter or provide emergency healing at low HP.
